Definitions for STM32F2/F4 IRQ handlers, firmware loader, linker script processing, and build script for silk loader.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Definitions for STM32F2/F4 IRQ handlers, firmware loader for flash and CRC, and STM32F4 linker script.
- **[waftools](waftools/README.md)**: Processes linker scripts and supports converting linked targets to various file formats using objcopy.

## Files
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for configuring and compiling the silk loader using ARM GCC tools.
